definitions: It is enough to say, without going into further detail.
To indicate that one is providing only a summary or the most important point, implying that more could be said but is unnecessary or inappropriate.
examples: Suffice it to say, the meeting did not go as planned.
Suffice it to say, we won the championship.
Suffice it to say, the project was a success.
synonyms: to make a long story short
